title: [TaCZ] Rusty
description: A gunpack of Rusty for Timeless and Classics Zero
body:
This gun pack is for "Timeless and Classic Guns: Zero"

This pack includes different guns and different attachments for players to use

Use a functional shaderpack may have the best effect

How to use：

Open your Minecraft game file, go to ".minecraft/tacz", put the whole ziped gun pack in it (no need to unzip), then use command "/tacz reload" in game, if there are any accident, just restart the game should be ok.
